name: mathml-polyfills
author: W3C Math Working Group, Igalia S.L., David Carlisle, Neil Soiffer, Paul Libbrecht

scripts.build: npx rollup ../all-polyfills.js -f iife -o allpolyfillsbundle-script.js  --output.name allpolyfillsbundle && npx rollup ../all-polyfills.js -f es -o allpolyfillsbundle-module.js
